11.reason: pout called without checking if t->lchild is NULL; may cause segfault

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  pout called without checking if t->lchild is NULL; may cause segfault
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  calls pout on possibly NULL left child, causing segmentation fault
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing NULL check for t->lchild before recursive call, will cause segmentation fault when left child is NULL
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing NULL check for t->lchild before recursive call; passing NULL pointer causes segmentation fault.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [When t->lchild is NULL, passing NULL to pout leads to dereferencing NULL pointer in recursive call]

12.reason: pout called without checking if t->rchild is NULL; may cause segfault

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  pout called without checking if t->rchild is NULL; may cause segfault
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  calls pout on possibly NULL right child, causing segmentation fault
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing NULL check for t->rchild before recursive call, will cause segmentation fault when right child is NULL
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing NULL check for t->rchild before recursive call; passing NULL pointer causes segmentation fault.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [When t->rchild is NULL, passing NULL to pout leads to dereferencing NULL pointer in recursive call]
